description: As an IT Security Analyst at a healthcare organization, process a security incident for employee David Kim, who reported his company laptop stolen. In Snipe-IT, check in David Kim's laptop, updating its status to 'Lost/Stolen' with the note 'SECURITY INCIDENT #SI-2025-0042: Reported stolen on 2025-03-06. Police report filed. Remote wipe initiated.' Check out the MacBook Pro 16 (ASSET-L009) from the New Hire Pool to David Kim with the checkout note 'Emergency replacement for stolen device - SI-2025-0042'. Create a new asset to track the insurance claim with asset tag 'ASSET-L012
